name: @rwese/pi-question
description: Unified question tool for pi coding agent - single or multi-question interactions with optional notes and custom input support

scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -m 'chore: Bump patch version' && git push && git push --tags
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -m 'feat: Bump minor version' && git push && git push --tags
scripts.version:major: npm version major -m 'BREAKING CHANGE: Major version bump' && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:patch: npm run validate && npm run version:patch && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm run validate && npm run version:minor && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm run validate && npm run version:major && npm publish
